spec_match.rationale: `beforeinput` handler reads `dataTransfer.items`, calls `preventDefault()`, and routes each file into a side gallery — the exact pattern an IME-aware editor would use.

interactive.rationale: Editable surface, single-file and sticker-pack simulated insertions, a strict MIME gate, a reject simulator, a real Android keyboard path for on-device users, and a gallery that updates live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises lift-to-gallery on insertion and toolbar buttons for desktop simulation — both work.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers multi-item DataTransfer sticker packs, strict allow-list rejection for SVG, text fallback logging, and duplicate detection based on file name, size, and MIME type.

references.rationale: The see-also section links directly to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5484282563919872.

design_system.rationale: The generated canvas palette now reads shared CSS variables via getComputedStyle, and local control/background styles continue to set foreground color.

summary: The media gallery now handles multi-file sticker packs, rejects unsupported SVG when strict gating is enabled, flags duplicate inserts, uses CSS variables for generated preview colors, and includes the required ChromeStatus reference.
